custom-sql.sql: SELECT DISTINCT OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId FROM OSB_AccountEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.koroneikiAccountKey) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.dossieraAccountKey) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.instructions) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AccountEntry.*} FROM OSB_AccountEntry WHERE ( (OSB_AccountEntry.activeSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_AccountEntry.supportEndDate <= ?) ) OR ( (OSB_AccountEntry.activeTicketSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_AccountEntry.ticketSupportEndDate <= ?) )

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AccountEntry.*} FROM OSB_AccountEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.koroneikiAccountKey) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.dossieraAccountKey) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (LOWER(OSB_AccountEntry.instructions) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEnvironment ON OSB_AccountEnvironment.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_ProductEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_ProductEntry.name = ?) OR (? IS NULL) )
SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_ProductEntry.*} FROM OSB_ProductEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_ProductEntry.name = ?) OR (? IS NULL) ) ORDER BY OSB_ProductEntry.name
